title: Static fields should not hold mutable collection types
messageFormat: Replace this mutable collection in a static field with a read-only or immutable collection type.
summary: Declaring a static field with a mutable collection type such as List<T>, Dictionary<TKey, TValue>, or an array shares a single growable container across the whole process. Marking the field readonly only freezes the reference, not the contents, so any caller can still add, remove, or replace elements and corrupt state observed elsewhere.
Expose the data through a read-only or immutable collection type so the shared state cannot be mutated after initialization.
